generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightTwinComponentActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting device modeled in BIM and controlled via DittoDevice messages, converting Revit photometric metadata into a UE5 light entity."
]
instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Central HVAC actuator defined in BIM, controlled via DittoDevice messages for real‑time regulation of HVAC."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor instrumented in the building, as part of the BIM‑enriched model."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]
instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor instrumented in the building."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]
instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ sensor instrumented in the building."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor instrumented in the building."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]
instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light level sensor instrumented in the building."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]
instance PowerConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Power consumption sensor instrumented in the building."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PowerConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]
instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]
instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]
instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]
instance PowerConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerConsumptionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched Building Information Model in Autodesk Revit containing geometry, sensor, actuator, and controller metadata for model‑driven twin generation."
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time temperature telemetry collected from building sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]
instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time humidity telemetry collected from building sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
]
instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time CO₂ telemetry collected from building sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
]
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time occupancy telemetry collected from building sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]
instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time light‑level telemetry collected from building sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]
instance PowerConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time power‑consumption telemetry collected from building sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono provides at‑least‑once message delivery of device telemetry to digital‑twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringServiceTemperature,
                      MonitoringServiceHumidity,
                      MonitoringServiceCO2,
                      MonitoringServiceOccupancy,
                      MonitoringServiceLightLevel,
                      MonitoringServicePowerConsumption,
                      ServiceControlLighting,
                      ServiceHVACControl
]

// C6: Services
instance MonitoringServiceTemperature : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors real‑time building temperature and publishes visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingTemperatureInsight
]
instance MonitoringServiceHumidity : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors real‑time building humidity and publishes visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingHumidityInsight
]
instance MonitoringServiceCO2 : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors real‑time CO₂ levels and publishes visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingCO2Insight
]
instance MonitoringServiceOccupancy : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors real‑time occupancy and publishes visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOccupancyInsight
]
instance MonitoringServiceLightLevel : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors real‑time light‑level and publishes visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingLightLevelInsight
]
instance MonitoringServicePowerConsumption : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors real‑time power consumption and publishes visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPowerConsumptionInsight
]
instance ServiceControlLighting : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service to control building lighting devices via Ditto messages."
    DTDFVocab:provides PrimaryLightOnAction,
                      DimLightingAction
]
instance ServiceHVACControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service to adjust HVAC setpoints via Ditto messages."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHVACTemperatureAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time building temperature status displayed on the facility dashboard."
]
instance BuildingHumidityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time building humidity status displayed on the facility dashboard."
]
instance BuildingCO2Insight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time building CO₂ status displayed on the facility dashboard."
]
instance BuildingOccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time building occupancy status displayed on the facility dashboard."
]
instance BuildingLightLevelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time building light‑level status displayed on the facility dashboard."
]
instance BuildingPowerConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time building power‑consumption status displayed on the facility dashboard."
]
instance PrimaryLightOnAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Turn a specific lighting device on via Ditto message."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance DimLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dim lighting devices to a specified brightness level (0–100 %) via Ditto message."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance AdjustHVACTemperatureAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust HVAC temperature setpoint via Ditto message."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The framework supports bidirectional communication, enabling the digital twin to send control commands back to the building control system (BCS). Control signals are transmitted through the same Eclipse Hono/​Ditto messaging infrastructure that carries operational data, allowing facility managers to monitor and operate the physical infrastructure via the DT, but the documents provide no explicit details on command formats, validation, authentication, or conflict‑resolution mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time data exchange ensures tight synchronization between the physical building and its digital twin; the documents do not specify exact synchronization frequencies, latency thresholds, or temporal granularity requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows a modular, model‑driven architecture built around a central DT framework hub. Model‑driven engineering (MDE) principles extract structured representations from enriched BIM models and automatically generate deployable twin artifacts. Runtime configuration management and standardized extension points enable integration of custom services and analytics, allowing the system to evolve without full redeployment. Resource management is achieved through dynamic service deployment, and coordination is guaranteed via the hub’s bidirectional data exchange capabilities."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin life‑cycle in the proposed model‑driven framework follows a structured path: (1) **BIM enrichment** – Building Control Engineers model sensors, actuators and controllers directly within the BIM environment, producing semantically rich 3‑D models; (2) **MDE transformation** – Model‑Driven Engineering techniques automatically extract structured representations from the enriched BIM, mapping building components (BCS) to semantic types; (3) **Deployment generation** – Using the extracted models, the framework auto‑creates deployable artifacts (Eclipse Ditto event models) and deploys them with minimal manual intervention, satisfying requirement R2 (reproducible DT setups); (4) **Runtime operation** – Real‑time data integration via Eclipse Hono syncs physical sensors with the digital twin, enabling continuous state consistency; (5) **Monitoring & control** – Facility Managers access interactive visualization dashboards (immersive interfaces) to monitor building operations; (6) **Evolution & governance** – DT Engineers extend functionality through defined modular extension points, enabling scalable service‑oriented development (R4). Transitions between phases are managed by automated workflows that preserve semantic integrity and record versioned artifacts, supporting lifecycle governance across stakeholder roles."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The system uses the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to quantify synchronization quality.  Over a 12‑minute measurement window with a regular 1‑second heartbeat, the ODTE components were score: timeliness 0.997, reliability 1.0, availability 1.0, resulting in a total of 0.997.  Timeliness reflects the delay between a state change in the physical counterpart and its update in the digital twin; reliability measures the ratio of successfully received updates; availability measures the physical system’s uptime perceived by the twin.  Policy‑based validation in Eclipse Ditto enforces value ranges and units for sensor data and performs pre‑execution checks on actuator commands to avoid unsafe operations.  Fault tolerance is provided by Eclipse Hono’s at‑least‑once message delivery and Ditto’s persistent event storage, ensuring resilience to network failures."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical network connectivity in the proposed framework is achieved through the Eclipse Hono and Eclipse Ditto platforms, which provide a messaging backbone for bidirectional exchange between the DT and physical assets. The documents describe this integration at a functional level but do not disclose specific protocols, topologies, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security provisions for the network communication."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is primarily achieved through the BIM ecosystem, where enriched BIM models serve as the source for device modeling, control logic, and twin deployment. Standardized extension points within the DT framework provide APIs for custom services and analytics; however, specific data exchange protocols or interoperability standards are not explicitly described. The architecture is designed to interoperate with enterprise systems and other Digital Twins via its modular, service‑oriented framework."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adopts the BIM meta‑model as its foundational semantic layer, ensuring compatibility with AECO industry modeling practices. Connectivity between the physical building and the twin is achieved using Eclipse Hono’s messaging capabilities and Eclipse Ditto’s device‑data model, which adhere to open interoperability conventions. Extension points are designed to accept services conforming to standard data exchange patterns, facilitating integration with other industry‑aligned tools and platforms. No additional ISO‑style certification or proprietary protocols are explicitly required by the documented implementation."
]
